SERVICES FOR founders

Social Media Management
Full account management across Instagram and LinkedIn. Content calendar, daily posting, community engagement, and monthly reporting — all handled.

Content Strategy

StrategyPositioningOne-time

Case study

BUILDING fintr FROM ZERO

A complete content strategy and visual identity built for a Gen Z personal finance app. Brand voice, 30-day calendar, platform strategy, and 9 production-ready posts.

Concept project
FINTR
Personal finance app for Gen Z

Fintr is an early stage personal finance app for 18 to 28 year olds. They had a great product and zero social presence. I built their complete content strategy from scratch — brand identity, tone of voice, content pillars, platform strategy, a 30-day content calendar, and 9 production-ready designed posts.

9
Posts designed
30
Day calendar
5
Content pillars
Brand voice and tone of voice guide
5 content pillars across key themes
Platform strategy across 4 channels
Full 30-day content calendar
9 designed Instagram posts
90-day growth strategy and KPIs
About me

STRATEGY FROM inside

I'm a 22-year-old founder and social media strategist based in Bengaluru. I work from inside a startup ecosystem — which means I understand the pace, the constraints, and the ambition of early stage companies in a way most agencies don't.

I led social media for a startup and have been creating graphic design and content for brands across industries. I bring strategic thinking and hands-on execution in one package.

I work remotely with clients in the US, UK, and Australia. Small number of clients at a time — so each one gets my full attention.

Social Media Strategy Content Creation Graphic Design Canva Figma Brand Voice Instagram Growth Content Calendars

"Good social media isn't about posting every day. It's about saying something worth listening to."

If you're looking for someone who actually cares about your brand and not just the deliverables — let's talk. I take on a small number of clients so I can go deep on each one.
